name: Generic_Keys

documentation.description:
Contracts in this unit are meant for analysis only, not for run-time
checking.

subprograms.name: Ceiling
subprograms.code: function Ceiling (Container : Set; Key : Key_Type) return Cursor

subprograms.name: Contains
subprograms.code: function Contains (Container : Set; Key : Key_Type) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Delete
subprograms.code: procedure Delete (Container : in out Set; Key : Key_Type)

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description:
Key is no longer in Container

Other elements are preserved

The elements of Container located before Key are preserved

The elements located after Key are shifted by 1

A cursor has been removed from Container

parameters.name: Key
parameters.description:
Key is no longer in Container

Other elements are preserved

The elements of Container located before Key are preserved

The elements located after Key are shifted by 1

A cursor has been removed from Container

subprograms.name: Element
subprograms.code: function Element (Container : Set; Key : Key_Type) return Element_Type

subprograms.name: Equivalent_Keys
subprograms.code: function Equivalent_Keys (Left, Right : Key_Type) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Exclude
subprograms.code: procedure Exclude (Container : in out Set; Key : Key_Type)

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description:
If Key is not in Container, nothing is changed

Otherwise, Key is removed from Container

Other elements are preserved

The elements of Container located before Key are preserved

The elements located after Key are shifted by 1

A cursor has been removed from Container

parameters.name: Key
parameters.description:
If Key is not in Container, nothing is changed

Otherwise, Key is removed from Container

Other elements are preserved

The elements of Container located before Key are preserved

The elements located after Key are shifted by 1

A cursor has been removed from Container

subprograms.name: Find
subprograms.code: function Find (Container : Set; Key : Key_Type) return Cursor

documentation.returns:
If Key is not contained in Container, Find returns No_Element

Otherwise, Find returns a valid cursor in Container

The element designated by the result of Find is Key

subprograms.name: Floor
subprograms.code: function Floor (Container : Set; Key : Key_Type) return Cursor

subprograms.name: Key
subprograms.code: function Key (Container : Set; Position : Cursor) return Key_Type

subprograms.name: Replace

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description:
Key now maps to New_Item

New_Item is contained in Container

Other elements are preserved

Mapping from cursors to elements is preserved

parameters.name: Key
parameters.description:
Key now maps to New_Item

New_Item is contained in Container

Other elements are preserved

Mapping from cursors to elements is preserved

parameters.name: New_Item
parameters.description:
Key now maps to New_Item

New_Item is contained in Container

Other elements are preserved

Mapping from cursors to elements is preserved
